title: Junior Business Development Manager at Nexus Malls

jsonLd.title: Junior Business Development Manager at Nexus Malls
jsonLd.description:
Nexus Malls, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Business Development Manager for our Pune operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Nexus Malls:
Nexus Malls is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in MS Office

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Life and accident insurance
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Nexus Malls!
